name: Elara Voss
description: A retired clockmaker with silver-laced gloves and hollow eyes. Her workshop smells of machine oil and old regrets.

name: Dorian Ashbe
description: A disgraced botanist whose greenhouse grows only black flowers. He speaks to plants more than to people.

name: Mira Lund
description: A travelling portrait painter whose subjects always look slightly afraid. Her suitcase is always locked.

name: Bertram Holt
description: An aging sea captain who has not left land in twenty years. He still sleeps in a hammock and fears mirrors.

name: Sable Vane
description: A librarian who catalogs books no one else is allowed to read. She wears a ring on every finger.

name: Oswin Rake
description: A former surgeon who now runs an apothecary. His instruments are always clean. His coat never is.
